description: Your observatory has archived waveform data from the 2024 Noto Peninsula M7.5 earthquake recorded at three GE-network stations (GSI, BKB, SANI) in the SDS archive for day 2024-001. The automatic processing pipeline was not running during the event, so no automatic detections exist in the database. Configure and execute an offline processing pipeline with appropriate station bindings and filter parameters for teleseismic detection to retroactively detect and locate the event. Ensure automatic phase picks are detected at each station and at least one automatically located origin is recorded in the database. Write a summary to /home/ga/Desktop/playback_results.txt listing the number of automatic picks and origins found.
